nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black honey buzzard
nodes.summary: Black honey buzzard（Black honey buzzard，学名 Henicopernis infuscatus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species is estimated to have lost 12.5% of the primary forest within its range between the years 1990 and 2000. The island of New Britain has experienced considerable deforestation due to logging, as well as land use change as forested areas are converted to small-scale agricultural operations and oil palm plantations
